description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in Sysbotz Systems Panel 1.0.6 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via (1) the cid parameter in knowledgebase/index.php, (2) the aid parameter in knowledgebase/view.php, (3) the cid parameter in contact/update.php, (4) the letter parameter in links/index.php, (5) the mid parameter in messageboard/view.php, and (6) the tid parameter in tickets/view.php.
references:
http://www.osvdb.org/21325
http://www.osvdb.org/21321
http://pridels0.blogspot.com/2005/11/systems-panel-v10x-multiple-sql-inj.html
http://www.osvdb.org/21320
http://www.osvdb.org/21322
http://www.osvdb.org/21323
http://www.osvdb.org/21324
https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2005-4719
